name: reference
description: Reference configuration v2 (post pivot 2026-05-02). Increased Final-slot security (h_P=8, M=8 -> lambda=120 bits, ~4 orders stronger than v1). CandidateMax filter disabled by default (set to -8 = same as cut limit); remains a configurable Tier-3 structural defense documented in paper section 4. MaxIterations 500 cap (F2 v1 max iter was 181). Replaces F4/F10/F13 baseline.
